m	Z	m
Z d$d
Z#d%d
d d!
d!e%
Build fftpack:
  python setup_fftpack.py build
Run tests if scipy is installed:
  python -c 'import scipy;scipy.fftpack.test(<level>)'
Run tests if fftpack is not installed:
  python tests/test_pseudo_diffs.py [<level>]
